title: Operation Tinsel Trace I — IR Report
subtitle: Hack The Box — Festive Sherlocks 2023
summary: A comprehensive incident response report investigating a 16-day multi-phase intrusion by the Grinch threat actor against North Pole Operations — from insider-assisted binary exfiltration and cloud credential abuse to printer filesystem exploitation, ZeroLogon domain compromise, and ransomware deployment.

title: Zeta-9 Security Incident Report
subtitle: BTLO Halloween 2025 Challenge
summary: A comprehensive incident response report investigating the Zeta-9 security breach involving FortiGate firewall exploitation, lateral movement across on-premises and cloud infrastructure, and critical data exfiltration.
